---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for Cenvero Fleet
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

Thanks for suggesting an improvement.

The most helpful feature requests explain the operator problem first, not just the implementation idea.

## Problem

What operator pain point, maintenance burden, or workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like Cenvero Fleet to do?

## Why This Matters

Please explain the concrete value:

- faster operations
- safer key or update handling
- better fleet visibility
- easier bootstrap or recovery
- lower operator error rate

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope

Which areas would this touch?

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] TUI
- [ ] transport
- [ ] agent runtime
- [ ] database/storage
- [ ] release/update flow
- [ ] docs only

## Security or Reliability Considerations

Could this change affect:

- SSH trust or host-key pinning
- update safety
- key management
- operator data ownership
- privilege boundaries

If yes, please explain.

## Additional Context

Examples, mockups, prior art, or deployment context.
